blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and edges are well-defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected that obscure text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations affecting document readability.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles that distort text.

cut_off_detection.description: No document edges are cut off or excluded from the image frame.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections or incomplete parts of the receipt/invoice.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements blocking document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, and item description. It also provides clear evidence of payment and is consistent with the expected location.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 7 out of 8 required fields, including supplier (Austrian Airlines), consumer (SEPEROVICH SERGEY), transaction amount (EUR 503.85), transaction date (03 Feb 25 and 05 Feb 25), invoice/receipt number (225000410298), item description (flight details), and payment method (PayPal). This meets the criteria for an expense document.

extraction.special_notes: The Economy Light fare does not include free checked baggage. If you do not want to travel without luggage, please feel free to buy baggage allowance for an extra charge.

issues.description: The customer address is missing from the receipt. The receipt must show the customer address as per compliance requirements.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Hotel/flights invoices should indicate the name of the worker not the end client

issues.description: Travel expenses must be submitted using the travel report template as per compliance requirements.
issues.recommendation: Please submit the travel expense using the travel report template
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Travel expenses must be submitted using the travel report template

issues.description: The tax amount is present, but the tax rate is missing. The receipt must show the tax rate as per compliance requirements.
issues.recommendation: Please ensure the tax rate is included on the receipt
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Documents must be actual tax receipts or invoices; booking confirmations will not suffice

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has issues with missing customer address, missing travel report template, and missing tax rate. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance with the specified standards and policies.
